---
title: "Primary Analysis"
author: "Rachel Austin"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyr)
library(openxlsx)
library(survminer)
library(survival)
```

```{r}
df <- read.xlsx("/Users/austinra/BIOS6624/Project 3/Data Processed/survival_df.xlsx")

#Change to factor
df$SEX <- factor(df$SEX)
df$DIABETES <- factor(df$DIABETES)
df$BPMEDS <- factor(df$BPMEDS)
df$CURSMOKE <- factor(df$CURSMOKE)
df$PREVCHD <- factor(df$PREVCHD)

#Remove missing baseline values - below list is var with NA values in table one
df <- df %>% filter(complete.cases(BPMEDS, TOTCHOL, BMI))
```

Preliminary Visualizations
```{r}
surv <- survfit(Surv(TIME_STROKE, STROKE)~SEX, data = df)
ggsurvplot(surv, censor = F)
ggsurvplot(surv, censor = F, fun= "cloglog")
```

Separate male and female data for analysis
```{r}
male_df <- filter(df, SEX ==1)
female_df <- filter(df, SEX ==2)
```

Manual backwards selection
```{r}
full_male_mod <- coxph(Surv(TIME_STROKE, STROKE) ~ AGE + DIABETES  + SYSBP + PREVCHD + BPMEDS + CURSMOKE + TOTCHOL + BMI, 
                    data = male_df)
summary(full_male_mod)
```


```{r}
reduced_male_mod1 <- update(full_male_mod, . ~ . - PREVCHD)
summary(reduced_male_mod1)

reduced_male_mod2 <- update(reduced_male_mod1, . ~ . - BMI)
summary(reduced_male_mod2)

reduced_male_mod3 <- update(reduced_male_mod2, . ~  . - TOTCHOL)
summary(reduced_male_mod3)

reduced_male_mod <- reduced_male_mod3
```

Schoenfield Residuals
```{r}
male_ph_check <- cox.zph(reduced_male_mod)
male_ph_check
```


```{r}
male_mean_chol <- mean(male_df$TOTCHOL, na.rm = TRUE)
male_mean_bmi  <- mean(male_df$BMI, na.rm = TRUE)

# Define high SYSBP
male_high_bp <- 160
male_normal_bp <- mean(male_df$SYSBP, na.rm = TRUE)

male_newdata <- expand.grid(
  AGE = c(40, 50, 60),
  DIABETES = c(0, 1),
  SYSBP = c(male_normal_bp, male_high_bp)
)

male_newdata$PREVCHD  <- 0
male_newdata$BPMEDS   <- 0
male_newdata$CURSMOKE <- 0
male_newdata$TOTCHOL  <- male_mean_chol
male_newdata$BMI      <- male_mean_bmi

male_newdata$profile <- with(male_newdata, paste0(
  "Age ", AGE, " | ",
  ifelse(DIABETES == 1, "Diabetes", "No Diabetes"), " | ",
  ifelse(SYSBP == male_high_bp, "High BP", "Normal BP")
))


male_prob_fit <- survfit(reduced_male_mod, newdata = male_newdata)


male_prob_fit_10 <- summary(male_prob_fit, times = 365.25*10)

male_results <- data.frame(
  profile = male_newdata$profile,
  AGE = male_newdata$AGE,
  survival_10yr = as.vector(male_prob_fit_10$surv)
)

male_results$risk_10yr <- paste0(round((1 - male_results$survival_10yr)*100,3),"%")
male_results

```




























```{r}
full_female_mod <- coxph(Surv(TIME_STROKE, STROKE) ~ AGE + DIABETES  + SYSBP + PREVCHD + BPMEDS + CURSMOKE + TOTCHOL + BMI, 
                    data = female_df)

summary(full_female_mod)
```

Manual Backwards Selection
```{r}
reduced_female_mod1 <- update(full_female_mod, . ~ . - BMI)
summary(reduced_female_mod1)

reduced_female_mod2 <- update(reduced_female_mod1, . ~ . - TOTCHOL)
summary(reduced_female_mod2)

reduced_female_mod3 <- update(reduced_female_mod2, . ~  . - BPMEDS)
summary(reduced_female_mod3)

reduced_female_mod4 <- update(reduced_female_mod3, . ~ . -PREVCHD)
summary(reduced_female_mod4)

reduced_female_mod <- update(reduced_female_mod4, . ~  . -CURSMOKE)
summary(reduced_female_mod)
```

Schoenfield Residuals
```{r}
female_ph_check <- cox.zph(reduced_female_mod)
female_ph_check
```

```{r}
female_mean_chol <- mean(female_df$TOTCHOL, na.rm = TRUE)
female_mean_bmi  <- mean(female_df$BMI, na.rm = TRUE)

# Define high SYSBP
female_high_bp <- 160
female_normal_bp <- mean(female_df$SYSBP, na.rm = TRUE)

female_newdata <- expand.grid(
  AGE = c(40, 50, 60),
  DIABETES = c(0, 1),
  SYSBP = c(female_normal_bp, female_high_bp)
)

female_newdata$PREVCHD  <- 0
female_newdata$BPMEDS   <- 0
female_newdata$CURSMOKE <- 0
female_newdata$TOTCHOL  <- female_mean_chol
female_newdata$BMI      <- female_mean_bmi

female_newdata$profile <- with(female_newdata, paste0(
  "Age ", AGE, " | ",
  ifelse(DIABETES == 1, "Diabetes", "No Diabetes"), " | ",
  ifelse(SYSBP == female_high_bp, "High BP", "Normal BP")
))


female_prob_fit <- survfit(reduced_female_mod, newdata = female_newdata)


female_prob_fit_10 <- summary(female_prob_fit, times = 365.25*10)

female_results <- data.frame(
  profile = female_newdata$profile,
  AGE = female_newdata$AGE,
  survival_10yr = as.vector(female_prob_fit_10$surv)
)

female_results$risk_10yr <- 1 - female_results$survival_10yr
female_results
```
